en.name: Level 85 — Brilliant Evermore
en.shortDescription: A barren polluted wasteland of extreme weather, abandoned buildings holding supplies, and dangerous robotic guardians.
en.atmosphere: A desolate desert under toxic smog, brutal heat and acidic waterways, haunted by radio broadcasts hinting at ecological collapse.
en.tips: Shelter in buildings for filtration and supplies. Disable RoboPets' solar panels to stop them. Ration bottled water and cover up from the sun.
